title: Euclidean and Non-Euclidean Geometry

visual_sequence.observation: Angle sum separates flat, spherical, and hyperbolic models.
Spherical excess becomes an area measurement.
Bending can change the embedding while preserving measured distances.
A developed strip tests whether the path was straight on the surface.
